title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.680 - Fees deposited in state treasury
text:
334.680.  Fees deposited in state treasury. — All fees authorized pursuant to the provisions of sections 334.650 to 334.685 shall be collected by the director of the division of professional registration and shall be transmitted to the department of revenue for deposit in the state treasury to the credit of the healing arts fund.
(L. 1996 H.B. 999)
